text: Present list Nespresso coffee pods full bodied (suitable for short macs & espresso) Cue black leather belt bag Silk/satin cami + shorts Pjs size sor 10 The little black book of maintenance excellence - Daniel T Daley The checklist manifesto - Atul gawande Maintenance Engineering Handbook - Mike Sondalini (I can't find a hard copy anywhere) FRACAS - Failure reporting, analysis, corrective action system - Ricky Smith & Bill Keeter Mischief minx eyeshadow palette from MAC Slow/fast/slow dazzleshadow single eyeshadow MAC €® luv & lashes magnetic lashes (full length natural, 4 magnets per lashes, some only have 2 magnets) A good Water colour sketchbook/journal (I haven't had time to look for a specific one but | would need on that can handle wet on wet and heavy washes) good paper that won't buckle easily with heavy washes (jacksons have lots of helpful people, possibly the visual journal from jacksons but whatever they recommended) | want a book not a block (1 already have a block)
